coverage: 100% of reachable node types, including bundled G_Parenting, G_Implicit Attribute, and G_Implicit Geometry helpers.
source_wrapper: The supplied SPLIT N TAP object evaluates only a 42-vertex / 80-face placeholder icosphere. Browser and reference evidence instead instantiate its intended nested Split n Tap WIP group on the same one-point carrier geometry.
object_inputs: Split and select-parts depend on Object/Object Parent inputs that are unassigned in the supplied file. Blender's Split=true branch therefore evaluates empty; the browser catalog hides these nonfunctional controls until object picking is supported.
validation: Five Blender/VM cases covering authored, short, wide, coarse-resolution, and long/fine shafts have exact vertex and face counts. Linked Float-to-Integer group inputs truncate, full-range Trim Curve opens cyclic splines with a duplicated endpoint, and Fill Curve preserves point indices while normalizing face winding. Together these restore the loft resolution, welded radial seam, top-cap normal, and normal-driven displacement. X/Y bounds are exact to four decimals; the worst remaining bound delta is 0.0006 units.
